meta.title: Dale's Plea To Take Advantage Of This Great Time In ICS Security
meta.description: One-minute from Dale Peterson's S4x20 Keynote. With all of the opportunity now for ICS security professionals, this is not the time to being doing drudgery or work you don't believe in. Find something you do believe in, enroll in it, and create the future.
